titleEn: This horrific story just happened earlier today in Lebanon: Israel called the young man in the car, they asked him if he wants to die alone or with his family in the car. He left the car and got bombed on the side of the road.

summaryEn: IDF: The Artillery Corps carried out its first operational use of the new Ro’em (SIGMA 155) howitzer this week in southern Lebanon. The 282nd Regiment targeted Hezbollah rocket and anti tank positions, with the IDF saying the strikes were successful. The Ro’em offers higher fire rate, longer range, and improved mobility, and will gradually replace the aging M109.

title: 식중독 혐의로 투르키예에서 사망한 사우디 시민에 관한 새로운 정보: 80대 시민은 식당 안에서 아내와 함께 식사를 했습니다. 고인은 닭고기를 먹었고, 아내는 고기를 먹었다. 중독 증상은 식당을 떠난 직후 나타났습니다. 아직 최종 조사 결과는 나오지 않았습니다. - - X: saudinews50
